{{Quote|I'm glad you're here, soldier. We've got another problem. The Empire has brought in their dreaded Dark Troopers and they are making a mess out there. We have to handle this immediately so if you're up to it, defeat 5 of them.|Captain Redding to a Rebel|<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Redding''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He directed Alliance operatives to take out [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] during the [[Battle of Restuss]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Redding was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
